title: rhamnoneuron balansae
side_effects: Rhamnoneuron balansae can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its high concentration of alkaloids and glycosides. Prolonged exposure to these compounds can also lead to stomach ulcers, diarrhea, and vomiting, making it essential to follow proper dosages and preparation methods. In severe cases, misuse of the plant can cause respiratory distress, rapid heartbeat, and even coma, highlighting the importance of consulting a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes. Furthermore, individuals with pre-existing medical conditions, such as kidney or liver disease, may be more susceptible to these adverse effects.
